channel.title: Test Feed - Please Verify
channel.description: Test feed to verify Android RSS readers can fetch this URL

item.title: Test Article 1 - Verification
item.author: Test Author
item.dc:creator: Test Author
item.description: This is a test article to verify that Android RSS readers can successfully fetch and display feed content from this URL.
item.content:encoded: This is a test article to verify that Android RSS readers can successfully fetch and display feed content from this URL.
